name: Clean & Jerk Ladder

movements.notes: athlete chooses one of four starting weights (225, 255, 285, or 315 lb men / 145, 165, 185, or 205 lb women), then attempts progressively heavier singles every 90 seconds; failing the OPENING attempt eliminates the athlete; partial credit given for a successful clean with a failed jerk after at least one made lift

description: An elimination-style clean and jerk ladder where the athlete picks a starting weight, then must make progressively heavier singles every 90 seconds or be eliminated.
